interface:
A command-line notes manager. Subcommands (implement all):
  add <text> [--tag X ...]            add a note
  list [--tag X] [--search Q] [--json]   list notes
  get <id>                            show a note
  edit <id> <text>                    change a note's text
  tag <id> <tag>  /  untag <id> <tag>   add or remove a tag
  rm <id>                             remove a note

checks.name: add_list
checks.symptom: Basic add then list doesn't show what I added.

checks.name: edit
checks.symptom: I can't change a note's wording after adding it.

checks.name: tag_ci
checks.symptom: When I tag a note 'Work' and filter by 'work' I get nothing — case shouldn't matter.

checks.name: search_allfields
checks.symptom: Search only looks at the note text — I want it to match tags too, case-insensitively.
